sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n2133" key="ai)gh/khs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αἰγ-ήκης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>, <sense id="n2133.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">made of goatskin</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τύμπανον</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg019:4:16" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Theol.Plat.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.16</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (nisi leg. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">αἰνήχης</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
